title:

content:
## Search dataset requests

### Christchurch Roadworks New

### Population GIS data (at a 250m or 500m grid resolution), building outline GIS data, and building usage GIS data for Christchurch, both before and after February 2011 New

Created : 5 Aug 2024  —  Modified 18 Jul 2025 Status : Agency notified

### List of accredited employers (healthcare)
Created : 7 Mar 2023  —  Modified 11 Jun 2026 Status : Agency responded (18 Mar 2024) Response : Other

### Recycle data on plastic waste from household bin New
Created : 17 Aug 2022  —  Modified 14 Oct 2024 Status : Agency notified

### Christchurch 1/50 & 1/200 yr flood New
Created : 22 Jul 2019  —  Modified 1 May 2024 Status : Agency notified

### Free and paid council parking locations within Christchurch City

### Chemical Toilet Locations CHCH
